title: Will the good guys kill Gendo split
display_title: Will the good guys kill Gendo split
wikitext:
[]: Will the "good guys" kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Sep 18, 2019 4:58 pm Tyloethius wrote: Watching these rebuilds it seems like no matter what happens Gendo will say it was a part of his plans

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Sep 24, 2019 9:25 am Giji Shinka wrote: The thing that will definitely not be part of his plan is when he is killed by Wille or Shinji.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 24, 2019 11:44 am They won't have a chance to kill Gendo anyway; in all likelihood he will sacrifice himself to become part of Eva-13, and at that point stopping Final Impact will be what matters.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Sep 24, 2019 1:35 pm Reichu wrote: in all likelihood he will sacrifice himself to become part of Eva-13,

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Tue Sep 24, 2019 6:04 pm pwhodges wrote: With his wife being in Unit-01, wouldn't that be a bit of a missed chance?

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 25, 2019 12:23 am pwhodges wrote: With his wife being in Unit-01, wouldn't that be a bit of a missed chance?

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Sep 25, 2019 8:33 am NGE Gendo: *tries to get Yui back to human form so he can have hot nasty human sex with her* NTE Gendo: *tries to become an Eva just like Yui so he can have hot nasty Eva sex with her* EDIT: Wait, this was all foreshadowed in the Evangelion Schick commercials , what with Gendo growing Eva-esque energy wings and ascending into the heavens, Eva Unit 13 style. Anno, you genius bastard, you!

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Wed Sep 25, 2019 10:06 am ... I misread that as "Evangelion Schlick commercials" and my brain went to bad places.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 25, 2019 10:18 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: NGE Gendo: *tries to get Yui back to human form so he can have hot nasty human sex with her*

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Sep 25, 2019 11:41 am 01 and 13 will have hot nasty sex in Paris, using parts of the Eiffel Tower as giant sex toys. I think that’s a reasonable conclusion.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Sep 25, 2019 1:35 pm But Mari's already stuffed the Eiffel Tower up the muzzle of a (Positron?) cannon.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Sep 25, 2019 2:33 pm Ooh... kinky.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Sep 28, 2019 1:42 am Reichu wrote: They won't have a chance to kill Gendo anyway; in all likelihood he will sacrifice himself to become part of Eva-13, and at that point stopping Final Impact will be what matters.

[]: Re: Did Nerv let Wille restore Paris?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 28, 2019 8:01 am Eva-13 is totally going to merge with Eva-01 to make the True & Divine Evangelion that's in the movie's title. The writing is, as they say, on the wall there. I'm not sure why you're so dead-set on such a grossly simplistic fate for a character as important as Gendo as "the good guys kill him dead". Since when has Eva been that kind of story?

[]: Re: Will the good guys kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Oct 29, 2019 1:53 pm Because Gendo died in a most karmic fashion in the other two major timelines. The real trouble is by that point his death was pointless; in the anime he'd already started Third Impact and in the manga the same thing happened. Also we don't really have good guys in this setting, just marginally less terrible people and children.

[]: Re: Will the good guys kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Oct 29, 2019 4:13 pm CyberXIII wrote: Because Gendo died in a most karmic fashion in the other two major timelines. The real trouble is by that point his death was pointless; in the anime he'd already started Third Impact and in the manga the same thing happened.

[]: Re: Will the good guys kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 30, 2019 6:24 pm CyberXIII wrote: Also we don't really have good guys in this setting, just marginally less terrible people and children.

[]: Re: Will the good guys kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Nov 03, 2019 1:19 pm ^Seele is the death cult and Gendo opposes their plan just like he did in NGE. As for whether Wille will kill him, no, I don't think they will. I agree with Reichu's prediction that he will merge with Eva 13 and Kaworu to become part of the True Evangelion opposite Rei and Yui. Not only that, I think we'll see he fundamentally wants the same thing that Misato and co do but is willing to go to extreme lengths to get it.

[]: Re: Will the good guys kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by Mr. M » Sun Nov 03, 2019 5:08 pm I don't think they're going to kill Gendo: they Just want to stop his Plan. Wille is Not made of killers (Just look to Misato in 3.0 for example.).

[]: Re: Will the good guys kill Gendo? [split]             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Sun Nov 03, 2019 5:40 pm Wille is (not) made of killers. HM. Just wanted to say that Misato couldn't kill Shinji, specifically. Gendo could make the difference, especially if Shinji's life would be at stake again. He knows this, of course; otherwise he wouldn't be Gendo. (My train of thoughts kinda derailed here; crap.)
